subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled by the fire of the Love of God! Verily, I was informed of the text of thy letter, wherein thou praisest the firm servant of God
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
